title: haplopappus axilliflorus
intro: Haplopappus axilliflorus, also known as axillary flaxen daisy or golden yarrow, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Haplopappus axilliflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
